meaning: n.乘汽车者,常坐汽车的人
examples: Their excellent gas mileage and even their improved interior design notwithstanding, today's compact cars simply fail to provide the feel a traditional motorist yearns for.
I managed to beg a lift from a passing motorist.
Two women were being hunted by police after a road rage attack on a male motorist.
In Stourbridge, a motorist reversed into a house while trying to get off the drive.
Fire crews were called to flooding incidents and to rescue a motorist after heavy rain overnight.
